subcodes.first_line: By My life! My Pen weepeth over what hath befallen My Soul, and the Prison crieth out by reason of Mine oppression and what hath come upon Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لعمری ینوح قلمی علی ما ورد علی نفسی و یصیح السجن لمظلومیتی و ما ورد علی فی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @justice and wrath of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
